creator: shamaz.mazum@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 253141
The patch for the gtk port

Hello. This commit adds support for DMABUF to gtk4. It is required for new versions of WebKit to work properly. I think this may be useful for other gtk applications as well.

Here is a discussion which helped me a lot in writing this patch:
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-x11/2024-August/005152.html
